title: PVA White Glue 60ml Bottle, Box of 12
features: Strong PVA Glue. Full strength premium art and craft adhesive.
Supplied in a pack of twelve 60ml bottles.
Child friendly and washable. Conforms to British Toy Standard BS EN 71.
Suitable for use with paper, card, fabrics, wood, etc.
Ideal for crafts - scrapbooking, card making, decorations and more.
description: Product Description GET STICKING WITH STICK-E Stick-E products for all your craft projects. Stick-E Craft Glue Strong PVA Glue. Full strength premium art and craft adhesive . Supplied in packs of twelve 60ml bottles. Child friendly and washable . Conforms to British Standard BS EN 71. Suitable for use with paper, card, fabrics, wood, etc. Ideal for crafts - scrapbooking, card making, decorations and more. Mix with water to make a simple varnish for artwork, decoupage, drawings etc .. Smooth formula also provides a great base for making slime .
